name: Martin Compston's Norwegian Fling
overview: Best buds Martin Compston and Phil MacHugh are back on the road enjoying a fling in the fjords. They visit Scotland's Scandi neighbour for death metal, reindeers, vikings and more.

trailers.title: Martin and Phil are back for an epic fling in the fjords! #MartinCompstonsNorwegianFling #Shorts
Martin has found his new pack #MartinCompstonsNorwegianFling #Shorts #Wolf
